title: DeepWiki Scale — Core Fan-Out
phase_relation: next implementation phase after deepwiki-scale-parity-next-phase (anti-compression slice); does not replace prior PRDs/TDDs
primary_goal: Make strict source-derived DeepWiki-scale breadth core behaviour of the expanded generation path, harden the planner so it fans out, and carry promoted catalog-topic granularity downstream.
comparator_isolation: ragflow-deepwiki.md is comparison-only; never read as evidence, prompt seed, or copied structure
owner_decisions_needed: Confirm expanded is the official/core scale path and deepwiki-scale stays only as a compatibility alias.
Approve the source-derived breadth-budget policy defaults (BreadthPolicy) before any billed live run.
Approve the deferred slice: standalone Phase 4 enforcement that cross-references plans/promoted-topic-contract.json end-to-end.
